label: Stat part (rest level)
description: Scales the stat based on the pawn's current rest level.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# StatPart type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Sort order among stat parts. Higher values execute later.

factorExhausted.label: Factor (exhausted)
factorExhausted.description: Stat multiplier when the pawn is exhausted.

factorVeryTired.label: Factor (very tired)
factorVeryTired.description: Stat multiplier when the pawn is very tired.

factorTired.label: Factor (tired)
factorTired.description: Stat multiplier when the pawn is tired.

factorRested.label: Factor (rested)
factorRested.description: Stat multiplier when the pawn is fully rested.
